Name: departments_by_pk
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('departments_by_pk', (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "public"."departments"."id" = $3::uuid AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($4::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base")) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
